🚨Anatoly Yakovenko, CEO of @solanalabs , has been appointed to the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission’s newly formed Innovation Advisory Committee. 
The 35-member panel - launched by CFTC Chairman Michael S. Selig - brings together leaders from crypto, traditional finance, and tech to advise the agency on regulation and emerging technologies like blockchain and AI. Yakovenko joins other prominent executives such as Coinbase’s Brian Armstrong and Ripple’s Brad Garlinghouse as the committee aims to shape future policy in digital asset markets.

RT @Airdrop_Guard: 昨天去参加 Backpack 在香港的用户交流会，Armani 讲了两个小时，我们问了一大堆问题，都得到了耐心和详细的解答，又一起吃了一品鸡煲

团队、用户、网友，大家见面都是老朋友了，像家人一样开心，我也找回了才入币圈，那种纯真感觉，真好…

Ideas don’t compound. 
Execution does.

Here's my problem with AI

No, you don't need to spend 8 hours a day prompting a revolutionary app that you end up quitting as soon as you have to do something manually

Most of you are becoming AI's tools and don't even know

You're becoming the product of these LLMs

Almost nothing changed in your life since installing Claude

By no means I am saying it isn't useful, just that most of us are doing it wrong

You don't have to build a $1M ARR company overnight

Just build something that is useful for you, and maybe something of value will come

That's how AI can change your life
